entry.title: AGN SIG Spotlight Series, 21 July 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: Our Spotlight Series highlights recent advances in AGN science, with a strong emphasis on participation from early-career researchers, and includes plenty of time for community discussion following the presentations.

entry.title: DGCE SIG Seminar, 23 July 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: From Micro to Macro: Connecting the Physics of Galaxy Formation Across Scales. Speaker: Drummond Fielding, New York University

entry.title: HWO SIG Seminar, 12 August 2026 - NASA Science
Community Science (Ad ASTRA) Workshop, Sept 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: 1-3 September 2026. The Community Science (Ad ASTRA) Workshop is organized by the NASA Astrophysics Division to engage the community in defining future large, strategic astrophysics missions.

entry.title: GW SIG Seminar, 23 July 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: GW SIG Seminar on LISA Preparatory Science and LISA Science Gaps. Details TBA

entry.title: Habitable Worlds Observatory SIG Seminar, 12 Aug 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: Habitable Worlds Observatory SIG Seminar. Details TBA

entry.title: Community Science (Ad ASTRA) Workshop, Sept 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: 1-3 September 2026. The Community Science (Ad ASTRA) Workshop is organized by the NASA Astrophysics Division.

entry.title: 2026 Sagan Summer Workshop - Exoplanets with Roman Surveys: Microlensing and Transits - NASA Science
entry.summary: Date: July 20 - 24, 2026 Location: Caltech, Pasadena, California

entry.title: Shaping the Emerald City - NASA Science
entry.summary: The hills and basins of Seattle, Washington, have been sculpted by glaciers and modified by humans.

entry.title: Artemis II: El regreso de la humanidad a la Luna
entry.summary: Acompáñanos en esta edición especial de Universo curioso de la NASA mientras hacemos un recorrido por la misión Artemis II de principio a fin.
